---
title: "PROPORCION DE ADULTOS"
author: "Edith"
date: "2025-12-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
setwd("C:/Users/edith clemente arena/Desktop/EPIFITAS -GRADIENTE/treeline-epiphytes/treeline-epiphytes")
data <- read.csv("estrucPOB.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ";", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
str(data)      # Estructura de la base de datos
head(data)
```

```{r}
POBSTRU <- data %>% ###TABLA DE DATOS POBLACIONALES
  select(elevation,subplot, forof,morphospe, family, life_stage, l_leaf_stem, n_shoots_leaf, reprod_stage, herbi)
head(POBSTRU)
# 1️⃣ Filtrar solo la especie Hymenophyllum sp1
hymeno_pobstru <- POBSTRU %>%
  filter(morphospe == "Hymenophyllum sp1")

# 5️⃣ Graficar
###variable categoricas 
vars_cat <- c("life_stage", "reprod_stage")
cat_summary <- hymeno_pobstru %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(vars_cat), names_to = "variable", values_to = "category") %>%
  group_by(elevation, variable, category) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(count))
g_cath1 <- ggplot(cat_summary, aes(x = factor(elevation), y = prop, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +  # 👈 igual que en los otros
  labs(
     title = "Hymenophyllum sp1",  
    x = "Elevation (m.a.s.l.)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, nrow = 1) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )
g_cath1

# 1️⃣ Filtrar solo la especie Elaphoglossum vulcanicum
elapho_pobstru <- POBSTRU %>%
  filter(morphospe == "Elaphoglossum vulcanicum")

# 2️⃣ Variables categóricas
vars_cat <- c("life_stage", "reprod_stage")

# 3️⃣ Resumen de proporciones
cat_summary_elapho <- elapho_pobstru %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(vars_cat),
               names_to = "variable",
               values_to = "category") %>%
  group_by(elevation, variable, category) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(count))

# 4️⃣ Gráfico
g_catelapho <- ggplot(cat_summary_elapho,
                      aes(x = factor(elevation), y = prop, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
  labs(
    title = "Elaphoglossum vulcanicum",   # ⬅️ título de la especie
    x = "Elevation (m.a.s.l.)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, nrow = 1) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )

g_catelapho


# 1️⃣ Filtrar solo la especie Elaphoglossum metallicum
elapho_met_pobstru <- POBSTRU %>%
  filter(morphospe == "Elaphoglossum metallicum")

# 2️⃣ Variables categóricas
vars_cat <- c("life_stage", "reprod_stage")

# 3️⃣ Resumen de proporciones
cat_summary_elapho_met <- elapho_met_pobstru %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(vars_cat),
               names_to = "variable",
               values_to = "category") %>%
  group_by(elevation, variable, category) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(count))

# 4️⃣ Gráfico
g_catelapho_met <- ggplot(cat_summary_elapho_met,
                          aes(x = factor(elevation), y = prop, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
  labs(
    title = "Elaphoglossum metallicum",   # ⬅️ Título de la especie
    x = "Elevation (m.a.s.l.)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, nrow = 1) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )

g_catelapho_met


# 1️⃣ Filtrar solo la especie Melpomene personata
melpo_pobstru <- POBSTRU %>%
  filter(morphospe == "Melpomene personata")

# 2️⃣ Variables categóricas
vars_cat <- c("life_stage", "reprod_stage")

# 3️⃣ Resumen de proporciones
cat_summary_melpo <- melpo_pobstru %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(vars_cat),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "category"
  ) %>%
  group_by(elevation, variable, category) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(count))

# 4️⃣ Gráfico
g_catmelpo <- ggplot(cat_summary_melpo,
                     aes(x = factor(elevation), y = prop, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
  labs(
    title = "Melpomene personata",   # ⬅️ Título de la especie
    x = "Elevation (m.a.s.l.)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, nrow = 1) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )

g_catmelpo

# 1️⃣ Filtrar solo la especie Peperomia sp1
pepero_pobstru <- POBSTRU %>%
  filter(morphospe == "Peperomia sp1")

# 2️⃣ Variables categóricas
vars_cat <- c("life_stage", "reprod_stage")

# 3️⃣ Resumen de proporciones
cat_summary_pepero <- pepero_pobstru %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(vars_cat),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "category"
  ) %>%
  group_by(elevation, variable, category) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(count))

# 4️⃣ Gráfico
g_catpepero <- ggplot(cat_summary_pepero,
                      aes(x = factor(elevation), y = prop, fill = category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
  labs(
    title = "Peperomia sp1",   # ⬅️ Título de la especie
    x = "Elevation (m.a.s.l.)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Category"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, nrow = 1) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )

g_catpepero

```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

graficar_categorias <- function(data, especie) {
  
  df <- data %>% filter(morphospe == especie)
  
  vars_cat <- c("life_stage", "reprod_stage")
  
  cat_summary <- df %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(vars_cat),
                 names_to = "variable",
                 values_to = "category") %>%
    group_by(elevation, variable, category) %>%
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
    mutate(prop = count / sum(count))
  
  g <- ggplot(cat_summary, aes(x = factor(elevation), y = prop, fill = category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
    labs(
      title = especie,
      x = "Elevation (m.a.s.l.)",
      y = "Proportion",
      fill = "Category"
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
    facet_wrap(~ variable, nrow = 1) +
    theme(
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey85"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 9, face = "bold"),
      axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "cm"),
      panel.spacing = unit(0.3, "lines"),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
    )
  
  return(g)
}


g_hymeno   <- graficar_categorias(POBSTRU, "Hymenophyllum sp1")
g_vulcan   <- graficar_categorias(POBSTRU, "Elaphoglossum vulcanicum")
g_metalli  <- graficar_categorias(POBSTRU, "Elaphoglossum metallicum")
g_melpo    <- graficar_categorias(POBSTRU, "Melpomene personata")
g_pepero   <- graficar_categorias(POBSTRU, "Peperomia sp1")


todos_graficos <- g_hymeno + g_vulcan + g_metalli + g_melpo + g_pepero +
  plot_layout(nrow = 5)

todos_graficos

todos_graficos <- (g_hymeno + g_vulcan + g_metalli) /
                  (g_melpo + g_pepero)

todos_graficos

todos_graficos <- g_hymeno /
                  g_vulcan /
                  g_metalli /
                  g_melpo /
                  g_pepero

todos_graficos

```

```{r}

```
